---GIT2GDLM-7f3a9b2c---
abc1234	2026-01-15T10:30:00+00:00	feat: add user authentication with JWT tokens
Added JWT-based authentication middleware with refresh token rotation.
Supports RS256 signing with configurable key pairs.
---FILES-7f3a9b2c---

src/auth/jwt.ts

---GIT2GDLM-7f3a9b2c---
def5678	2026-01-16T14:00:00+00:00	fix: resolve race condition in connection pool
Pool exhaustion under concurrent load caused deadlocks.
Root cause: connections weren't returned on query timeout.
Added timeout-based connection reclaim.
---FILES-7f3a9b2c---
src/db/pool.ts
src/db/connection.ts
---GIT2GDLM-7f3a9b2c---

Moved payment logic out of the monolithic order service.
New module handles Stripe integration, retry logic, and webhook verification.

---GIT2GDLM-7f3a9b2c---
stu5678	2026-01-21T13:30:00+00:00	fix(auth): handle expired refresh tokens gracefully
Users were getting 500 errors when refresh tokens expired.
Now returns 401 with clear error message and forces re-login.

---GIT2GDLM-7f3a9b2c---
vwx9012	2026-01-22T10:00:00+00:00	perf: optimize database query for user search
Replaced sequential queries with a single JOIN.
Response time dropped from 340ms to 45ms for the user search endpoint.
---FILES-7f3a9b2c---
